overallAssessment: The agent flattened all component endpoint definitions to REST/HTTPS, ignoring explicit protocol specifications in the Phase 3.3 interface contracts. CONTRACT-BACKEND-003 specifies gRPC/Protobuf for internal backend communication; CONTRACT-SYNC-011 specifies TUS resumable upload protocol; CONTRACT-SECURITY-012 specifies KMS API integration. Each of these components received REST endpoint definitions instead. Per catalog §2: protocol mismatch contradicting an explicit contract is HIGH severity. This is the canonical defect pattern identified in per-role assessment 23.
